allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const p=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\('detail endpoint OK, title=',p.title,'| has detail_content:', 'detail_content' in p\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('not our API:',s.slice\(0,60\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./dist/data/site.json'\); console.log\('role:',s.role,'| name:',s.name\); console.log\('tagline:',s.tagline\); console.log\('skills:',s.skills.length,'items'\); console.log\('intro_html starts:', s.intro_html.slice\(0,60\).replace\(/\\n/g,' '\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('/tmp/cfg.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('collections:', [c['name'] for c in d['collections']]\); print\('backend:', d['backend']\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('cfg_check.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('collections:', [c['name'] for c in d['collections']]\); print\('backend:', d['backend']\); print\('media_folder:', d.get\('media_folder'\), '| public_folder:', d.get\('public_folder'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('admin/config.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('site_url:', d.get\('site_url'\)\); print\('display_url:', d.get\('display_url'\)\); print\('collections:', [c['name'] for c in d['collections']]\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./dist/data/careers.json'\); c.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.id, '| freelance:', x.freelance, '|', x.company\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('admin/config.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); f=[c for c in d['collections'] if c['name']=='careers'][0]['fields']; print\('careers fields:', [x['name'] for x in f]\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('admin/config.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); print\('slug\(global\):', d.get\('slug'\)\); c=[x for x in d['collections'] if x['name']=='careers'][0]; print\('careers identifier_field:', c.get\('identifier_field'\), '| slug:', c.get\('slug'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('admin/config.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); c=[x for x in d['collections'] if x['name']=='careers'][0]; pos=[f for f in c['fields'] if f['name']=='position'][0]; print\('YAML OK'\); print\('position label:', pos['label']\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./dist/data/projects.json'\); const t=p.find\(x=>x.id==='_build-test'\); console.log\('images:', JSON.stringify\(t.images\)\); console.log\('count\(<=3\):', t.images.length\); console.log\('thumbnail_url:', t.thumbnail_url\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./dist/data/projects.json'\); console.log\('남은 프로젝트 수:', p.length\)")

Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('admin/config.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); pj=[c for c in d['collections'] if c['name']=='projects'][0]; print\('projects fields:', [f['name'] for f in pj['fields']]\)")
